heading: Omitted
label: 1400 to 1400v Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 1400, , , ; , , , authorized payment of temporary unemployment compensation under sections 1400 to 1400k of this title to persons who exhausted their rights under other unemployment compensation laws.Pub. L. 85–441, title I, § 10172 Stat. 171Pub. L. 86–773 Stat. 14June 4, 1958Mar. 31, 1959Section 1400a, , , , authorized Secretary to enter into agreements with States for payment of temporary unemployment compensation provided for in sections 1400 to 1400k of this title.Pub. L. 85–441, title I, § 10272 Stat. 172June 4, 1958Section 1400b, , , , made special provision for veterans and Federal employees and for fair hearing and review in denial of such benefits.Pub. L. 85–441, title I, § 10372 Stat. 173June 4, 1958Section 1400c, , , ; , , ; , , , provided for repayment of amounts of any temporary unemployment compensation benefits, except benefits paid to veterans and Federal employees, paid under sections 1400 to 1400k of this title through device of reduction of credits allowed under , Internal Revenue Code.Pub. L. 85–441, title I, § 10472 Stat. 173Pub. L. 86–778, title V, § 524(b)74 Stat. 982Pub. L. 88–173, § 277 Stat. 306section 3302 of Title 26June 4, 1958Sept. 13, 1960Nov. 7, 1963Section 1400d, , , , defined “Secretary”, “State”, and “first claim” as used in sections 1400 to 1400k of this title.Pub. L. 85–441, title II, § 20172 Stat. 174June 4, 1958Section 1400e, , , , provided for review by appropriate State agency with respect to determinations of entitlement to temporary unemployment compensation under sections 1400 to 1400k of this title.Pub. L. 85–441, title II, § 20272 Stat. 174June 4, 1958Section 1400f, , , , set out penalties for false statements or representations in connection with payments under sections 1400 to 1400k of this title and provided for recovery of overpayments.Pub. L. 85–441, title II, § 20372 Stat. 174June 4, 1958Section 1400g, , , , required each State to provide Secretary with whatever information he might require in administering sections 1400 to 1400k of this title.Pub. L. 85–441, title II, § 20472 Stat. 175June 4, 1958Section 1400h, , , , provided for payments to States of funds for benefits under sections 1400 to 1400k of this title, posting of requisite bonds in connection therewith, and liability of certifying and disbursing officers.Pub. L. 85–441, title II, § 20572 Stat. 175June 4, 1958Section 1400i, , , , provided for denial of benefits under sections 1400 to 1400k of this title to aliens employed by Communist governments or organizations.Pub. L. 85–441, title II, § 20672 Stat. 176June 4, 1958Section 1400j, , , , authorized promulgation of rules and regulations by Secretary to carry out provisions of sections 1400 to 1400k of this title.Pub. L. 85–441, title II, § 20772 Stat. 176June 4, 1958Section 1400k, , , , authorized appropriation of funds necessary to carry out sections 1400 to 1400k of this title.Pub. L. 85–441, title II, § 20872 Stat. 176June 4, 1958Section 1400, , , , defined “compensation period”, “first claim”, “State unemployment compensation”, “Secretary”, “State”, “State agency”, “State law”, “temporary extended unemployment compensation”, “title XV”, and “week” as used in sections 1400 to 1400v of this title.llPub. L. 87–6, § 275 Stat. 8Mar. 24, 1961Section 1400m, , , , provided for payment of temporary extended unemployment compensation benefits under sections 1400 to 1400v of this title for any period of unemployment between , and .Pub. L. 87–6, § 375 Stat. 8Mar. 24, 1961March 24, 1961June 30, 1962lSection 1400n, , , , provided for reimbursement by the Federal government of any State unemployment compensation paid under sections 1400 to 1400v of this title in excess of formula amount.Pub. L. 87–6, § 475 Stat. 9Mar. 24, 1961lSection 1400, , , , placed limitations on total payments and reimbursements under sections 1400 to 1400v of this title.olPub. L. 87–6, § 575 Stat. 9Mar. 24, 1961Section 1400p, , , , set out the covered period for benefits under sections 1400 to 1400v of this title as , to .Pub. L. 87–6, § 675 Stat. 10Mar. 24, 1961Mar. 24, 1961June 30, 1962lSection 1400q, , , , covered agreements with States for payment and reimbursement of temporary unemployment compensation under sections 1400 to 1400v of this title, amendment, suspension, or termination of such an agreement, denial of benefits, review of determinations by State agencies, and reduction of benefits in certain cases.Pub. L. 87–6, § 775 Stat. 10Mar. 24, 1961lSection 1400r, , , , provided for payment of benefits under sections 1400 to 1400v of this title to veterans and Federal employees.Pub. L. 87–6, § 875 Stat. 12Mar. 24, 1961lSection 1400s, , , , set out penalties for making false statements or representations in connection with benefits under sections 1400 to 1400v of this title and provided for recovery of overpayments.Pub. L. 87–6, § 975 Stat. 12Mar. 24, 1961lSection 1400t, , , , required each State to furnish Secretary with information required to administer program under sections 1400 to 1400v of this title.Pub. L. 87–6, § 1075 Stat. 13Mar. 24, 1961lSection 1400u, , , , made provision for payments to States under sections 1400 to 1400v of this title, certification by Secretary to Secretary of the Treasury for payment of sums to each State, surety bonds, liability of certifying and disbursing officers, and costs of administration.Pub. L. 87–6, § 1175 Stat. 13Mar. 24, 1961lSection 1400v, , , , authorized promulgation by Secretary of rules and regulations necessary to carry out sections 1400 to 1400v of this title.Pub. L. 87–6, § 1275 Stat. 14Mar. 24, 1961l
